name: How much does knowledge graph and entity file generation usually cost?

mainEntity.name: How much does knowledge graph and entity file generation usually cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Cost depends on dataset size, number of sources, level of cleanup required, and whether the deliverable is a one-time file or an ongoing pipeline. Projects cost more when names are inconsistent, relationships are implicit, or the graph must support complex search or AI use cases.
acceptedAnswer.description: Pricing depends on data volume, cleanup effort, and whether you need a one-time build or an ongoing pipeline.

description: Pricing depends on data volume, cleanup effort, and whether you need a one-time build or an ongoing pipeline.
